item.title: 标准银行利润创历史新高，得益于手续费增长与客户数量增加
item.description: 标准银行集团有限公司——按资产规模计算的非洲最大贷款机构——报告创纪录利润，因客户群扩大推动手续费及佣金收入增长，同时市场波动带动交易收入上升。【原文：Standard Bank Group Ltd., Africa’s biggest lender by assets, reported record profit as a growing client base bolstered fee and commission income, and as market volatility drove trading revenue.】

item.title: 伊朗战争迫使土耳其重新考虑利率路径并暂停降息
item.description: 土耳其的降息周期很可能在周四结束，因为战争导致的全球能源价格飙升，可能重新点燃该国的通胀问题。【原文：Turkey’s cycle of interest-rate cuts will likely end on Thursday as a war-driven spike in global energy prices threatens to reignite the country’s inflation woes.】

item.title: 棕榈油延续涨势，原油上涨提振生物燃料吸引力
item.description: 棕榈油期货延续涨势，有望实现六天内第五次上涨，因油价重返每桶100美元上方提振了生物燃料原料的需求前景。【原文：Palm oil futures extended a rally, heading for the fifth gain in six sessions, as oil’s jump back above $100 a barrel increases demand prospects for biofuel feedstocks.】

item.title: 乌克兰警告油价飙升将助长普京的战争资金
item.description: 乌克兰央行行长表示，美国主导的对伊朗制裁行动可能给这个饱受战争摧残的国家经济施加额外压力，同时在俄罗斯总统普京发动入侵的第五年为其提供助力。【原文：Ukraine’s central bank chief said the US-led campaign against Iran risks piling additional pressure on the country’s war-devastated economy while handing a boost to Russian President Vladimir Putin in the fifth year of his invasion.】

item.title: 香港逮捕对冲基金及经纪公司员工 涉内幕交易调查
item.description: 香港当局本周展开联合行动，打击涉嫌内幕交易和腐败行为，调查对象包括两家证券公司和一家对冲基金管理公司。【原文：Hong Kong authorities conducted a joint operation this week targeting alleged insider dealing and corruption, with the investigation including two securities firms and a hedge fund management firm.】

item.title: 印度餐饮股下跌，燃气短缺冲击餐厅
item.description: 印度餐饮外卖企业股价下跌，因中东冲突引发的烹饪燃气短缺导致餐厅警告运营将受影响。【原文：Shares of Indian food delivery firms dropped as restaurants warned of disruptions to operations after the Middle East conflict triggered a cooking-gas crunch.】

item.title: 印度拟推智能手机出口激励政策 助力苹果业务增长
item.description: 知情人士透露，印度正拟定新一轮智能手机制造激励政策，将政府补贴与出口量及本土零部件使用率挂钩。此举将惠及苹果公司、三星电子及其供应商。【原文：India is drafting a new round of smartphone manufacturing incentives that would link government subsidies to exports and deeper use of locally made components, in a move that will benefit Apple Inc., Samsung Electronics Co. and their suppliers, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 随着中东局势升级，铁矿石货运路线被迫改道
item.description: 中东局势持续恶化，导致铁矿石运输受阻。随着战争封锁全球最重要的航运通道之一，部分货船被迫中途改道驶往东亚地区。【原文：Iron ore shipments are being disrupted by the worsening conflict in the Middle East, with some cargoes diverted mid-voyage to East Asia as war chokes one of the world’s most critical shipping lanes.】

item.title: 中国收紧燃料出口限制，伊朗战争冲击石油供应
item.description: 知情人士透露，随着北京进一步收紧限制以应对中东战争的影响，中国炼油企业已开始取消已商定的成品油出口货运，包括汽油和柴油。【原文：Chinese oil refiners have begun canceling agreed refined fuel export cargoes, including gasoline and diesel, according to people familiar with the matter, as Beijing further tightens curbs to cope with the impact of war in the Middle East.】

item.title: 从4万英尺高空看伊朗
item.description:
霍尔木兹海峡似乎将关闭数月之久。这将造成严重影响。

【原文：

It looks like the Strait of Hormuz will be closed for months. That will hurt.

】

item.title: 检方辩称萨姆·班克曼-弗里德不应获得重审
item.description: 检方表示，FTX联合创始人萨姆·班克曼-弗里德要求重审的请求应被驳回，因为他未能证明其定罪存在不公之处。【原文：Prosecutors say FTX co-founder Sam Bankman-Fried’s request for a new trial should be rejected because he has failed to show how his conviction was unfair.】

item.title: 新加坡人工智能投资计划最高达39亿美元
item.description: Bridge Data Centres计划在其本土市场新加坡投入高达50亿新元（约合39亿美元）用于人工智能技术研发，旨在加速其在亚洲地区的业务增长。【原文：Bridge Data Centres plans to invest as much as S$5 billion ($3.9 billion) in artificial intelligence technology development in its home market of Singapore, seeking to accelerate its growth across Asia.】

item.title: 微软推动非洲人工智能应用，向DeepSeek发起挑战
item.description: 微软公司正大力推动更多非洲用户采用其人工智能工具，这家美国科技巨头正与中国深思科技争夺全球最年轻且增长最快的人口群体中的客户。【原文：Microsoft Corp. is making a push for more Africans to adopt its artificial-intelligence tools as the US tech giant competes with China’s DeepSeek for customers from the world’s youngest and fastest-growing population.】

item.title: 澳大利亚准备全面撤销去年因伊朗战争实施的降息政策
item.description: 澳大利亚央行即将逆转去年短暂而温和的宽松周期，经济学家和交易员预测至少还将加息两次，因为伊朗战争可能进一步加剧本已回升的价格压力。【原文：Australia’s central bank is set to reverse last year’s short and shallow easing cycle, with economists and traders predicting at least two more interest-rate hikes as the war in Iran risks further fueling already resurgent price pressures.】

item.title: 印度燃气短缺加剧通胀担忧，伊朗战争持续扩大
item.description: 在孟买商业中心经营小餐馆的图沙尔·达达姆，上周被迫将素食套餐的价格上调10%。这款套餐是其菜单上广受欢迎的午餐主打菜。【原文：Tushar Dhadam, who runs a small restaurant in one of Mumbai’s commercial hubs, was forced to raise the price of a vegetarian thali, a popular lunch dish on his menu, by 10% in the past week.】

item.title: 日本保险公司对私募债务仍保持浓厚兴趣，尽管风险警示日益增多
item.description: 据彭博新闻社调查显示，尽管近期该行业健康状况出现预警信号，日本最大的人寿保险公司仍计划在4月开始的新财年中增加私人信贷投资。【原文：Japan’s largest life insurers are continuing plans to increase private credit investment in the fiscal year beginning April amid recent warning signals about the health of the sector, according to a survey by Bloomberg News.】

item.title: 亚洲液化天然气买家为中东战争持续数月做准备
item.description: 亚洲液化天然气买家正为中东战事可能导致数月供货中断做准备，全球最大出口工厂的长期停产正加剧供应紧张并推高价格。【原文：Asian buyers of liquefied natural gas are preparing for the war in the Middle East to disrupt deliveries for months, as a prolonged outage at the world’s largest export plant tightens supply and lifts prices.】

item.title: 希捷称伊朗战争短期内不会影响人工智能供应链
item.description: 希捷科技控股公司一位高管表示，中东冲突短期内不会对技术供应链造成重大影响。此前有担忧认为，战争可能开始阻断氦气等关键材料的供应。【原文：The Middle East conflict won’t significantly hamper the technology supply chain in the short run, according to a senior Seagate Technology Holdings executive addressing concerns that the war could begin to choke off the supply of vital materials such as helium.】

item.title: 铝价延续涨势，因伊朗战争风险引发"供应严重紧缩"担忧
item.description: 随着中东战争持续，铝价连续第三日上涨，当地生产商面临更严重的供应中断风险。【原文：Aluminum rose for a third day as the war in the Middle East dragged on, threatening deeper supply disruptions from local producers.】

item.title: 亚洲银行暂停海湾地区贷款扩张，因战争风险不断加剧
item.description: 在本周亚洲最大贷款协会会议的间隙，私下交谈中一个主题占据主导：伊朗战争如何动摇了人们对中东的热情。【原文：On the sidelines of a meeting this week of Asia’s largest loan association, private conversations were dominated by a single theme: how the Iran war has rattled enthusiasm for the Middle East.】

item.title: 印度企业从快速消费品到航空业纷纷为卢比贬值做准备
item.description: 埃拉拉证券预计卢比兑美元汇率将贬值至94-95卢比兑1美元。【原文：Elara Securities expects the rupee to weaken to 94–95 per dollar.】

item.title: 阿曼为防患未然从石油终端撤离船只
item.description: 据直接收到港口代理通知的人士透露，阿曼已作为预防措施，从其关键石油出口枢纽法哈尔港撤离了所有船舶。【原文：Oman has evacuated all vessels from its key oil export terminal at Mina Al Fahal as a precautionary measure, according to people who directly received a notice from a port agent.】

item.title: UI宝盛房地产投资信托基金即将上市，创下2026年新加坡最大规模IPO纪录
item.description: UI宝盛房地产投资信托基金将于周四开始交易，此前该基金通过首次公开募股筹集了约9.736亿新元（7.64亿美元），创下新加坡今年迄今为止的最大规模募资纪录。【原文：UI Boustead REIT is set to begin trading Thursday after an initial public offering that raised about S$ 973.6 million ($764 million), Singapore’s biggest this year so far.】

item.title: 国际货币基金组织与巴基斯坦延长谈判，伊朗战争影响存疑
item.description: 巴基斯坦与国际货币基金组织将继续就新一轮70亿美元救助计划的资金问题展开磋商，该计划旨在恢复国际社会对巴基斯坦经济的信心。与此同时，伊朗持续的战争局势可能对其东部邻国产生何种影响，这一问题正引发广泛关注。【原文：Pakistan and the International Monetary Fund will continue discussions over another round of funding from a $7 billion bailout program aimed at restoring confidence in the country’s economy, amid questions on how the ongoing war in Iran may impact its eastern neighbor.】

item.title: 据称安联、永明金融正考虑竞购汇丰人寿新加坡业务
item.description: 知情人士透露，在汇丰控股宣布对旗下新加坡保险业务进行战略审查后，安联集团和永明金融正考虑对该业务进行竞购。【原文：Allianz SE and Sun Life Financial Inc. are considering bids for HSBC Holdings Plc’s insurance unit in Singapore, according to people familiar with the matter, after the bank announced a strategic review of the business.】

item.title: 日本为应对能源危机已筹备数十年。但这足够吗？
item.description: 日本对海外能源供应的依赖——1973年石油危机将其暴露无遗——塑造了该国半个多世纪以来的政策走向。【原文：Japan’s dependence on overseas energy supplies — laid bare by an oil shock in 1973 — has shaped its policy for more than half a century.】

item.title: 对冲基金大举买入澳元看涨期权，因澳联储决议临近
item.description: 对冲基金在期权市场上加大对澳元的看涨押注，下周央行将公布决议。【原文：Hedge funds are ramping up bullish bets on the Australian dollar in the options markets before next week’s central bank decision.】

item.title: 股市剧烈波动使韩国期权显得便宜
item.description: 近日韩国股市动荡不安，其未来波动的预期与之相比都相形见绌。【原文：The South Korean stock market has been so turbulent in recent days that expectations for future swings pale in comparison.】

item.title: 伊朗战争威胁沙特阿拉伯380亿美元电子游戏计划
item.description: 中东战事正引发沙特阿拉伯相关人士的担忧，该国计划斥资380亿美元打造全球电子游戏中心。【原文：War in the Middle East is causing concern for the people behind Saudi Arabia’s plans to invest $38 billion to become a global video-game hub.】

item.title: 委内瑞拉任命新石油部长领导能源行业复苏
item.description: 委内瑞拉代理总统德尔西·罗德里格斯任命了新的碳氢化合物部长。此前美国总统特朗普驱逐尼古拉斯·马杜罗后，美国正依据新颁布的能源法指导这个南美国家恢复石油生产。【原文：Venezuela’s acting President Delcy Rodríguez appointed a new hydrocarbons minister as the US guides the South American country’s oil recovery under a new energy law after President Donald Trump’s ouster of Nicolás Maduro.】
